appHero.subheadline: Your guided path from skills to your first job — built around what you know, what you've done, and where you want to go.
appHero.feature1Body: Find out what skills you already have — from your training, your work, and your life.
appHero.feature2Title: Build a CV that gets noticed
appHero.feature2Body: Create a professional CV tailored to what employers in Zambia are looking for.
appHero.feature3Body: Explore in-demand careers, understand what qualifications you need, and match to real job openings.

register.subtitle: We need some information to get started

landing.subtitleBody: Uncover and articulate your skills through natural AI-guided conversations. Build your skill profile and download a CV to kickstart your job search. Create a free account to save your progress and revisit your conversation history.

workTypeDescription.selfEmployment: You work for yourself, run your own business, or take on freelance or contract jobs
workTypeDescription.formalSectorWagedEmployment: You have a paid job and work for an employer, company, or organization
workTypeDescription.formalSectorUnpaidTraineeWork: You're in a training or internship role to gain skills or experience
workTypeDescription.unseenUnpaid: You do unpaid work like caregiving, household tasks, or community volunteering

report.skillsDescriptionText: Below, you will find a list of the skills discovered during your conversation with {{appName}}, along with their descriptions.

disclaimer.part2: Listed skills are based on a conversation with the candidate, are not verified or validated by Tabiya, and may be inaccurate.
disclaimer.part3: Information should be checked before use for job search, job interviews, or for creating a CV. To revise this information, speak with {{appName}} again or create a complete CV based on this report.

report.bodyText: This report summarizes the key information gathered during a conversation with {{appName}} on {{date}}. {{appName}} is an AI chatbot that assists job-seekers in exploring their skills and experiences. This report presents the candidate’s work experience and the skills identified from each experience. This information can be used to guide job search and highlight their skills when applying for jobs, especially during interviews with potential employers. It can be a good starting point for creating a complete CV.

skillsRankingPrompt.mainMessage: Almost done! Answer a few more research questions and we’ll send you <0>{{compensationAmount}}</0> airtime once you have completed all tasks.

skillsRankingBriefing.introWorkBased: If you are interested, I can calculate what share of <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> opportunities match your skills and how you compare with other seekers — you just need to show me how valuable this information is to you.
skillsRankingBriefing.introTimeBased: If you are interested, I can calculate what share of <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> opportunities match your skills and how you compare with other seekers. This might take some time — if you are not interested in waiting any longer, you can click <0>cancel</0> at any time in the next message, while I calculate. When you are ready please click <1>continue</1>.
skillsRankingBriefing.puzzleInstructions: You'll see tilted letters on a few screens. Turn each letter upright using the rotation buttons. You can cancel anytime. In 5% of cases, <0>more letters fixed = higher chance of receiving the information.</0> The rest of the time it depends on me.
skillsRankingBriefing.failedToContinue: Failed to continue. Please try again later.

skillsRankingProofOfValue.waitingMessage: Please wait while I run the calculations, or click cancel at any time if you do not want to wait any longer for the information.

skillsRankingCompletionAdvice.adviceMessage: Some advice: These numbers are for you. How might these numbers change the way you look for roles this week? Pause and consider where your time and energy now feel best spent in your strategy to find a job.

skillsRankingRetypedRank.question_1: As a last question, let's recall what I told you further above just regarding your own fit with opportunities:
skillsRankingRetypedRank.question_2: check again what I said three messages ago, how many percent of opportunities
skillsRankingRetypedRank.question_4: do you meet the key skills for?

skillsRankingPerceivedRank.questionWithDisclosure: Now, think of these 100 <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> users, who are mostly jobseekers from South Africa aged 18-34 with a matric from a township or rural school. <0>Exactly how many of those 100</0> do you believe would be a fit for <0>fewer opportunities</0> on <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> <0>than you</0>?
skillsRankingPerceivedRank.questionWithoutDisclosure: Before we really finish our conversation, I just have one last question related to the above — if you think of 100 people who are jobseekers from South Africa aged 18-34 with a matric from a township or rural school. How many of these 100 job seekers do you believe would be a fit for <0>fewer positions</0> on <1>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</1> than you?

skillsRankingMarketDisclosure.message_1: You meet the key skills for
skillsRankingMarketDisclosure.message_3: . That’s a solid range of options!

skillsRankingJobSeekerDisclosure.pendingMessage: Thanks! We're double-checking the latest {{jobPlatformUrl}} opportunities so the numbers are accurate. We'll share your results soon or you can ask for them when we call you for the phone survey.
skillsRankingJobSeekerDisclosure.updateError: Failed to update skills ranking state. Please try again later.

rotateToSolve.instructions1: Rotate each letter until it’s upright. Select a letter by clicking on it, then rotate it clockwise with
rotateToSolve.puzzleCompleteMessage: Puzzle complete! Please solve another one or cancel if you are not that interested in the information.

consentPage.introPart1: We created this AI tool for you with care to help you and other young people like you explore their skills and discover new opportunities.
consentPage.introPart2: AI technology is new and far from perfect. It doesn't understand context like humans do.
consentPage.introPart3: Always double-check important details and avoid sharing personal information about yourself and others with the AI during the conversation.
consentPage.introPart4: Help us keep all AI interactions safe and positive! 😊

consentPage.checkboxPrivacyPolicy: I have read and accept the <0>{{privacy_policy}}</0> of {{appName}}.

sensitiveDataForm.unskippableSubtitle: Please provide the following information to continue.
sensitiveDataForm.helpTipText: Your information is encrypted using state-of-the-art, end-to-end encryption and stored securely.
sensitiveDataForm.failedToLoadProgrammes: We couldn't load the programmes for this institution right now. Please try selecting it again.

sensitiveDataForm.savedSuccess: Personal data saved successfully and securely.
sensitiveDataForm.errorDefault: The personal data could not be saved. Please try again and if the problem persists, clear your browser's cache and refresh the page.
sensitiveDataForm.errorEncryptedDataTooLarge: The personal data seems to be too large to be saved. Please try again by entering smaller values for the fields. If the problem persists, clear your browser's cache and refresh the page.
sensitiveDataForm.rejectParagraph1: We're sorry that you chose not to provide your data. Providing this information helps {{appName}} deliver a more personalized experience for you. You will not be able to proceed and will be logged out.

careerReadiness.emptyList: No modules available at the moment.
careerReadiness.introduction: Work through each module at your own pace. Each one is an AI-guided conversation focused on a specific skill area. Pick up where you left off, or start a new module.
careerReadiness.pageDescription: Build the skills employers look for beyond your technical training

careerReadiness.heroDescription: Six modules to get you ready for the job market — professional identity, CV writing, cover letters, interviews, workplace readiness, and entrepreneurship. Work through them at your own pace.

moduleTitles.coverLetterMotivation: Drafting cover letters and motivation statements
moduleTitles.workplaceReadiness: Preparing to start a new job: workplace readiness

home.subtitle: {{appName}} is the bridge between what you've learned and where you're headed. Chat with AI to surface your skills, prep for interviews, and explore real career routes across Zambia.
home.profileStrengthHint: That's a strong start — try My Skills & Interests to surface more about what you know and enjoy.
home.whatToDo: What would you like to do today?
home.whatToDoSubtitle: Each module is an AI-guided conversation or resource to help you on your career journey.

hero.body: Your guided path from skills to your first job. Start by discovering what you bring to the table — then explore careers, build career readiness, and find real opportunities in Zambia.
hero.illustrationAlt: Person at a signpost on a path, exploring career directions

cta.buildProfileDesc: Start by discovering what you bring to the table, build a comprehensive skills report and tell us what kind of work you're interested in
cta.explorePathsDesc: Explore the sectors and careers you are interested in - salaries, qualifications pathways, training programs, top employers.
cta.jobMatchesDesc: Real openings across Zambia, matched to what you can do right now.

jobReadySection.title: Get Job Ready
jobReadySection.description: Need help job hunting? Work through these modules and build confidence for your CV, interviews, and everything in between.
jobReadySection.empty: No course modules are available yet.

modules.skillsDiscoverySubtitle: Chat with {{appName}} to discover your skills from work and life.
modules.skillsDiscoveryDesc: Chat with {{appName}} to uncover your skills and interests — from your studies, work, and everyday life.
modules.jobReadinessDesc: Build job readiness through guided AI modules — from understanding your professional identity and CV writing to interviews, workplace readiness, and entrepreneurship.
modules.careerExplorerDesc: Explore career pathways in Energy, Mining, Agriculture and more — with salary data and qualification routes.
modules.knowledgeHubDesc: Explore sector profiles, salary benchmarks, and TEVET qualification pathways all in one place.
modules.jobMatchingDesc: See how your skills match to real job openings and explore labour market insights across Zambia.

footer.collaboration: {{appName}} is a free career guidance tool offered by the Zambia Ministry of Technology and Science, built in partnership with the World Bank Group and Tabiya.

careerExplorer.title: Career Explorer
careerExplorer.subtitle: See which careers match your skills — salaries, qualifications, top employers.

knowledgeHub.introduction: Knowing what you're good at is only half the picture. These are the career pathways in highest demand across Zambia right now — explore them to see where your skills meet real opportunity.
knowledgeHub.keyEmployers: Key employers to look out for
knowledgeHub.tevetAccreditedProgrammes: TEVET accredited programmes relevant to the {{sector}} sector
knowledgeHub.shortCoursesNote: + {{count}} short courses offered by sector employers and specialist training providers.
knowledgeHub.tableCountAll: Showing all {{count}} occupations. Where no programme is listed, training is typically provided on-the-job by employers or curriculum is currently in development.
knowledgeHub.tableCountFiltered: Showing {{count}} occupations at ZQF {{level}}. Where no programme is listed, training is typically provided on-the-job by employers or curriculum is currently in development.
knowledgeHub.newProgrammesDevDesc: Priority curriculum areas identified through the ILO/TEVETA Skills Development for Increased Employability Programme (SDEP) and sector consultations.

jobMatching.pageDescription: Explore real job openings and see how your skills match opportunities across Zambia.

faq.lede: Answers to common questions about Njila — how it works, how to sign up, and how to resolve common problems.
